Mine name est Yoshikage Kira, I am 33 year old. Mine hut est in the northeast lands of Morioh, near the Lord's manor, and I have yet to be wed. I work in the fields, I make it my duty to arrive home before dusk. I do not smoke, but I do drink ale. I can be found asleep in the late hours of dusk, and I ensure that I get up at morn as healthy as Christ on the third day. I have no trouble doing that, as I enjoy a little amount of goat's milk before I lay in mine bed to slumber. The apothecary nun told me I have yet to contract the plague. What I'm explaining to thee est that I wish to live the life of a mere peasant. I trouble myself with no enemies, or winning or losing, as that would ruin my harmonious and simple existence. That is how I deal with the King's laws and the Lord's teachings, and that grants me eternal peace. Yet if I was to get in a duel, I would not be the one sent to heaven.
